notes:
Token Watch v1.8.0

• Total tokens 默认按「真实消耗」(含缓存命中)显示;新增「账单消耗」切换,对齐 Claude Code 的 /status
• 新增 Requests 卡片:总请求数 + 平均 tokens/请求
• 新增 Cache hit rate 卡片:缓存命中率 + 命中/输入拆分
• Total tokens 卡片可切换口径

Token Watch v1.8.0

• Total tokens defaults to "real consumption" (including cache hits); new toggle for "billed consumption" matching Claude Code's /status
• New Requests card: total requests + average tokens per request
• New Cache hit rate card: cache hit percentage + hit/input breakdown
• Total tokens card now has a mode toggle
